title: Hormozi - Risk Illusion (Full)
transcript: Big rewards often come with big risks, but most risk is an illusion. And the illusion is if you fail, you'll starve, go homeless, and die. But the reality is you just go back to zero and start over with even more lessons and experience, which sounds oddly free, right? And that's when you realize the biggest risk is just not taking any. And this is actually one of the stages of scaling, which is stage nine, where you actually need to make a massive industry bet on your business in order to get to the next level. But making a bet like that too early on can be disastrous. And so that's why we put together the $100 million scaling roadmap. All right, so it's guide that shows you exactly what our companies had to do to get past each stage of scaling by function as they grew. Because best case scenario, you risk little and gain a lot. Worst case, you risk at the wrong time and have nothing but downside. The difference between those two scenarios is the power of knowing what to do next. And so if that sounds a little interesting, you can grab your own personalized copy of the roadmap absolutely free. Just put in your business information and it'll actually customize the roadmap for you to your current stage. And if you'd like more help scaling on the thank you page, you can book a call with our team to see if coming out in person to have my actual team help you break through each of these levels if that sounds interesting. Either way, enjoy the roadmap and maybe I'll see you out here in Vegas.

hook.text: Big rewards often come with big risks, but most risk is an illusion.

sections.name: Hook - Reframe risk
sections.summary: Desafía la creencia de que el riesgo es real, reencuadra el fracaso como volver a cero con más experiencia

sections.name: Bridge - Stages of scaling
sections.summary: Conecta el concepto abstracto de riesgo con un framework concreto (stage 9 de scaling)

sections.name: Offer - Roadmap
sections.summary: Presenta el roadmap como herramienta para saber cuándo tomar riesgos

sections.name: CTA dual
sections.summary: Roadmap gratis + opción de book a call para ayuda presencial

structure.rehook_text: And this is actually one of the stages of scaling

key_phrases: if that sounds a little interesting
the biggest risk is just not taking any

cta.text: grab your own personalized copy of the roadmap absolutely free

analysis.emotional_arc: Miedo al riesgo → reencuadre liberador (el fracaso no es mortal) → curiosidad sobre framework → oferta sin fricción
strengths: Reencuadre poderoso: transforma el miedo al riesgo en libertad
CTA de fricción cero: gratis, personalizado, sin compromiso
Dual CTA: roadmap gratis + book a call como upsell natural
Tono conversacional que no presiona, invita
Best case/worst case como cierre lógico antes del CTA
patterns_to_replicate: Reencuadre filosófico como hook: tomar una creencia universal y voltearla con lógica simple
Patrón 'which sounds oddly free, right?' - validar la emoción del viewer después del reencuadre para anclarla
Conectar concepto abstracto con framework concreto numerado (stage 9) para dar credibilidad
CTA soft con 'if that sounds a little interesting' en vez de presión directa
Dual CTA escalonado: oferta gratis primero, upsell en thank you page después

notes: No es competencia directa de ADP. Hormozi vende a empresarios USA (Acquisition.com). Es referente mundial en estructura de ads. Ads con +1 año activas = unicornio.
